not_found: The requested resource was not found
unauthorized: You are not authorized to access this resource
forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action
server_error: An internal server error occurred, please try again later

auth.token_expired: Your session has expired, please log in again
auth.email_taken: This email is already in use
auth.account_disabled: This account is disabled, please contact support
auth.same_password: New password must be different from the current password

file.type_not_allowed: File type not allowed. Allowed types: {allowedTypes}

file.avatar_not_image: Avatar file must be an image

categories.cannot_be_own_parent: Category cannot be its own parent

delivery.not_assigned_to_you: This delivery is not assigned to you
